channel.title: Automation on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Junho Lee

item.title: Automating Tedious Metric Collection with Python and GitHub Actions
item.description: Examining an automated reporting system built with Python and GitHub Actions to escape the tedium of manually checking macroeconomic indicators every day.

item.title: Automating High-Quality HTML Slides with AI Agents and make-slide
item.description: Analyzing a workflow where an AI agent trained on design principles generates polished presentation materials as a single HTML file.

item.title: Data Structure Design for Efficient n8n Workflows
item.description: Addressing data bottlenecks encountered during API integrations and applying n8n’s core mechanics to real-world practice.
